name: gaia-lkm-skills
description: Field-neutral agent skills for LKM API retrieval, evidence-subgraph auditing, graph rendering, and scholarly review writing.

interface.shortDescription: Evidence-chain retrieval, graph auditing, and scholarly reviews
interface.longDescription: Use Gaia LKM Skills to query LKM APIs, inspect reasoning chains, build audited evidence subgraphs, render dependency diagrams, and write standalone academic reviews across disciplines.
defaultPrompt: Use Gaia LKM Skills to trace this claim's evidence chain and build an audited dependency graph.
Use Gaia LKM Skills to turn these retrieved claims into a standalone scholarly review.
